'''Clanson''' was a member of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]. [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Sisquoc]], a [[Scout/Legends|scout]] and fellow Intelligence officer, requested that Clanson and any other willing [[operative]] to accompany him and other members of his team when they planned to confront [[Barosa Warren]], who had been targeting former pupils of his who had joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], at the [[Secure Passage seminar]] on [[Dlor 3]].<ref name="AIR" />

{{Char-stub}}
